name: Brian's Chocolate Mint Christmas Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter until soft; gradually add sugar and blend until creamy.
2. Mix in beaten egg and extracts.
3. Stir salt and baking powder into flour; stir into butter/sugar mixture.
4. Melt chocolate in water over a double-boiler; add to dough.
5. Form the dough into a long roll, approximately 2-3 inches wide.
6. Wrap the dough with plastic wrap and chill overnight.
7. Slice the dough into 1/4-inch slices and place on a greased cookie sheet.
8. Sprinkle non-parallels over the cookies and press slightly with the back of a spoon.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 8-10 minutes.
10. Cool the cookies on a rack.
